common.needHelp: Need help? We're here for you!
common.footerAccountNote: You received this email because you have a Ciuna account.
common.refundNote: If you were charged, we'll refund to your original payment method within 24 hours.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Ciuna! Let's get started
welcome.title: Welcome to Ciuna!
welcome.intro: Thank you for joining Ciuna! We're excited to have you as part of our community. Your account is now active and ready to send money across borders in under 5 minutes.
welcome.featureSpeed: Send money globally in under 5 minutes - Lightning-fast cross-border transfers
welcome.featureTracking: Track your transfers in real-time with live updates
welcome.featureRecipients: Save your favorite recipients for instant transfers
welcome.featureRates: Enjoy competitive exchange rates with zero hidden fees
welcome.gettingStartedBody: To send your first transfer, simply click the "Send Money" button in your dashboard and follow the easy steps. Your money will reach its destination in under 5 minutes!

pending.subject: Transfer Created - #{{transactionId}}
pending.title: Transaction Created
pending.body: Your transfer to {{recipientName}} has been created and is now being processed. We'll send you updates as your money makes its way to its destination!
pending.nextBody: We're working on your transfer and will notify you as soon as it's completed. You can track the progress in your dashboard.

processing.subject: Transfer Processing - #{{transactionId}}
processing.title: Transfer Processing
processing.body: Great news! We've received your payment and your transfer to {{recipientName}} is now being processed. Your money will arrive in under 5 minutes!
processing.nextBody: We're working with our banking partners to complete your transfer. Thanks to our advanced technology, this typically takes under 5 minutes!

completed.subject: Transfer Completed Successfully! #{{transactionId}}
completed.title: Transfer Completed!
completed.body: Your transfer to {{recipientName}} has been completed successfully! The money has been sent and should arrive within minutes.
completed.nextBody: Your recipient should receive the money within minutes thanks to our fast processing. You can track all your transfers in your dashboard.

failed.subject: Transfer Failed - #{{transactionId}}
failed.title: Transfer Failed
failed.bodyWithReason: Unfortunately, your transfer to {{recipientName}} could not be completed. Reason: {{reason}}
failed.bodyNoReason: Unfortunately, your transfer to {{recipientName}} could not be completed. Please contact support for more information.

cancelled.subject: Transfer Cancelled - #{{transactionId}}
cancelled.title: Transfer Cancelled
cancelled.bodyWithReason: Your transfer to {{recipientName}} has been cancelled. Reason: {{reason}}
cancelled.bodyNoReason: Your transfer to {{recipientName}} has been cancelled. This may have been cancelled by you or our support team.

pending.subject: Order received - {{productTitle}} (#{{transactionId}})
pending.title: Order Received

fulfillment.inPerson: We'll deliver to {{contactName}} at {{deliveryAddressLine}}. Our rider will call {{contactPhone}} on arrival.

pending.nextBody: We're preparing your order and will notify you as soon as it's processed. You can track the progress in your orders.

processing.subject: Processing your order - {{productTitle}} (#{{transactionId}})
processing.title: Order Processing

hero.fixed: We've received your payment for {{productTitle}} ({{fundedAmount}} {{fundedCurrency}}) and are processing it now.
hero.userInput: We've received your payment for {{productTitle}} ({{fundedAmount}} {{fundedCurrency}}) and are processing your top-up now.

fulfillment.online: Delivery to {{contactName}} at {{contactPhone}} is on the way.
fulfillment.inPerson: Our rider is preparing delivery to {{contactName}} at {{deliveryAddressLine}} and will call {{contactPhone}} on arrival.

processing.nextBody: We'll send you a final confirmation as soon as your order is ready.

completed.title: Order Completed

fulfillment.online: Your order has been delivered to {{contactName}}. Check your order page for details.
fulfillment.inPerson: Our rider is on the way to {{contactName}} at {{deliveryAddressLine}} and will call {{contactPhone}} on arrival.

completed.nextBody: You can view the full receipt on your order page at any time.

failed.subject: Order failed - {{productTitle}} (#{{transactionId}})
failed.title: Order Failed
failed.bodyWithReason: Unfortunately, your order of {{productTitle}} could not be completed. Reason: {{reason}}
failed.bodyNoReason: Unfortunately, your order of {{productTitle}} could not be completed. Please contact support for more information.

cancelled.subject: Order cancelled - {{productTitle}} (#{{transactionId}})
cancelled.title: Order Cancelled
cancelled.bodyWithReason: Your order of {{productTitle}} has been cancelled. Reason: {{reason}}
cancelled.bodyNoReason: Your order of {{productTitle}} has been cancelled. This may have been cancelled by you or our support team.

pending.title: Referral payout request received
pending.body: Hi {{firstName}}, we've received your referral reward withdrawal request of {{amount}} {{currency}} to {{recipientName}}. Our team will review and process it—similar to when you start a send, you'll get another email when the payout is completed or if it's cancelled.
pending.nextBody: We'll notify you by email when the payout is sent or if the request is cancelled. You can also check status under Affiliates & Referrals in the app.

completed.subject: Referral payout sent — {{amount}} {{currency}}
completed.title: Referral payout completed
completed.body: Hi {{firstName}}, your referral reward withdrawal of {{amount}} {{currency}} to {{recipientName}} has been completed. This send appears in your activity like a regular transfer and counts toward your send totals for the year.

cancelled.subject: Referral payout request cancelled
cancelled.title: Referral payout cancelled
cancelled.body: Hi {{firstName}}, your referral payout request for {{amount}} {{currency}} to {{recipientName}} has been cancelled. Those funds remain in your available referral balance. If you did not expect this, contact support.
